youtube-shorts.keyChanges: Algorithm now prioritizes watch time, engagement rate, and content freshness; uses AI to detect relevance; Shorts playlist boosting; shifts from upload date to behavioral signals.
youtube-shorts.editingTips: Keep first 3 seconds hook; vertical 9:16; 15‑60 seconds; use captions; dynamic cuts; sound quality; brand consistency; use trending sounds; frame transitions; add end screens; maintain high bitrate.
youtube-shorts.postingTips: Post 1‑2 times daily; best times 8‑10am or 6‑8pm PST; vary time zones; use analytics to test; aim for 30‑60 sec; consistency is key.
youtube-shorts.titleTips: Include primary keyword; keep under 30 chars; use emojis sparingly; create curiosity; avoid clickbait; keep descriptive.
youtube-shorts.descriptionTips: Add hashtags (#Shorts); include 3‑5 keywords; add link to channel; keep under 100 chars; call to action.
summaries: Use trending sounds, not just visuals

tiktok.keyChanges: Algorithm now prioritizes creator authenticity, engagement depth, and content originality, while penalizing repetitive audio and copyrighted clips.
tiktok.editingTips: Use vertical 9:16 format, keep videos 15‑30 s, add captions, leverage trending sounds, apply quick cuts, use color grading, include a strong hook in first 3 s, keep transitions smooth, add text overlays for emphasis, and test video stability by previewing before posting.
tiktok.postingTips: Post 2–3 times daily, targeting 6‑9 am, 12‑3 pm, and 7‑10 pm local time. Monitor analytics to find personal peak engagement, avoid over‑posting, and schedule during high‑traffic windows on weekdays and weekends.
tiktok.titleTips: Hook in first 3 s, use emojis sparingly, keep under 10 chars, include keyword, reference trend or challenge.
tiktok.descriptionTips: Add 2–3 relevant hashtags, include a CTA, add location if applicable, keep description concise (≤140 chars), and use line breaks to improve readability.

instagram.keyChanges: Algorithm now prioritizes Reels, engagement depth, and real‑time interaction signals; hashtags have diminished influence, and AI-driven content personalization dominates the Explore feed.
instagram.editingTips: Use vertical 9:16 format, add captions, keep edits under 15 seconds for Reels, apply color grading for mood, include eye‑catching text overlays, and leverage AI tools for automatic sound matching and trend overlays.
instagram.postingTips: Post 1–2 feed posts per day, 3–5 Reels weekly, daily Stories; schedule around 7–9 am, 12–1 pm, and 7–9 pm local time; monitor analytics for audience peak times and adjust accordingly.
instagram.titleTips: Use emojis, concise hooks, include keyword, keep under 10 characters, add urgency, and end with a clear CTA.
instagram.descriptionTips: Start with a strong hook, ask a question, add a CTA, use line breaks for readability, place hashtags at the end, and keep captions under 200 characters for higher algorithm favor.

youtube-long.keyChanges: The YouTube Long algorithm now prioritizes videos with high engagement in the first 10-15 minutes, favoring content that keeps viewers hooked throughout. The algorithm also considers the audience retention curve, rewarding videos that maintain a steady viewership throughout. Additionally, YouTube Long now takes into account the video's overall watch time, rather than just the initial 12-second view count.
editingTips: Keep your intro concise and engaging, ideally within 0-2 minutes.
Use a mix of music, visuals, and voiceovers to maintain viewer interest.
Break up longer content into smaller, more manageable chunks.
Use annotations, cards, or end screens to encourage viewers to stay engaged.
Optimize your video's pacing and editing to maintain a steady flow.
postingTips: Post your YouTube Long video during peak hours (3-5 pm EST) for maximum visibility.
Space out your uploads to avoid flooding your audience's feed.
Consider posting on weekdays rather than weekends for better engagement.
Experiment with different posting frequencies to find what works best for your audience.
titleTips: Use attention-grabbing words like 'exclusive,' 'insider,' or 'revealed' to entice viewers.
Keep your title concise, ideally under 60 characters.
Use keywords relevant to your content, but avoid keyword stuffing.
Make your title descriptive, yet intriguing, to encourage clicks.
descriptionTips: Use a clear, concise summary of your content in the first 100-150 characters.
Include relevant keywords to improve video discoverability.
Use a mix of short and long sentences to maintain reader interest.
Avoid including links or calls-to-action in your description, as they may be ignored.
summaries: Maximize YouTube Long views with engaging intro content.
Boost audience retention with a mix of music and visuals.
Post during peak hours for maximum YouTube Long visibility.
Craft attention-grabbing titles with relevant keywords.

facebook-reels.keyChanges: The Facebook Reels algorithm now prioritizes content that keeps users engaged for longer periods, with a focus on watch time and audience retention. Algorithm also considers context and relevance of content to the user's interests.
editingTips: Use the 'Highlights' feature to create a visually appealing Reel with key moments and transitions
Edit in portrait mode for better mobile viewing
Experiment with different music styles and genres to match your brand's tone and style
Add captions and subtitles to improve accessibility and engagement
postingTips: Post Reels during peak hours (3-5 pm EST) when audience is most active
Space out posts to avoid overwhelming your audience (max 3-4 Reels per day)
Use Facebook's built-in scheduling feature to plan and publish Reels in advance
Monitor and adjust posting schedule based on audience engagement and performance
titleTips: Keep titles concise and descriptive (max 6 words)
Use attention-grabbing words and emojis to entice viewers
Make sure titles accurately reflect the content of the Reel
Experiment with different title variations to optimize performance
descriptionTips: Write engaging and informative descriptions to accompany Reels
Include relevant hashtags and keywords to improve discoverability
Use calls-to-action in descriptions to drive engagement and conversions
Keep descriptions concise and scannable for better readability
summaries: Boost Reels visibility with strategic music and sound effects
Get more views with Reels that tell a story or showcase a skill
Unlock Instagram-style growth with Facebook Reels' new features
Supercharge engagement with interactive Reels and polls
